description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script that runs `which python` and `python --version`. Add a `check-setup` job (excluded on tags) using the python:3.6 image, installing requirements from requirements_ci.txt, checking tox location, and executing `tox -v -e check`. Add four `conda_build_*` jobs (`conda_build_27`, `conda_build_34`, `conda_build_35`, `conda_build_36`) that run only on tags, triggers, or schedules, each using the appropriate continuumio/miniconda image, exporting CI_PYTHON_VERSION to 2.7, 3.4, 3.5, or 3.6, and running `bash conda_buildpackage.sh`. Add a `coverage-report` job (excluded on tags) using python:3.6, installing requirements, checking tox, and running `tox -e report`. Finally, add Python version test jobs `py27`, `py34`, `py35`, and `py36` (excluded on tags) each using the matching python image, installing requirements, checking tox, and running `tox -v -e py27`, `tox -v -e py34`, `tox -v -e py35`, and `tox -v -e py36` respectively, all inheriting the global before_script.
